mapper.select: SELECT * FROM uv_oil_matte_product ORDER BY material_code ASC, id ASC

SELECT * FROM uv_oil_matte_product WHERE material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR notes LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY material_code ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO uv_oil_matte_product ( material_code, supplier_code, stock_code, material_name, usage, category, color, thickness, shape, responsible_person, min_sheet_size, max_sheet_size, min_spacing, design_info, applicable_interface, notes, is_active ) VALUES ( #{materialCode}, #{supplierCode}, #{stockCode}, #{materialName}, #{usage}, #{category}, #{color}, #{thickness}, #{shape}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{minSheetSize}, #{maxSheetSize}, #{minSpacing}, #{designInfo}, #{applicableInterface}, #{notes}, #{isActive} )
mapper.update: UPDATE uv_oil_matte_product SET material_code = #{materialCode}, supplier_code = #{supplierCode}, stock_code = #{stockCode}, material_name = #{materialName}, usage = #{usage}, category = #{category}, color = #{color}, thickness = #{thickness}, shape = #{shape}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, min_sheet_size = #{minSheetSize}, max_sheet_size = #{maxSheetSize}, min_spacing = #{minSpacing}, design_info = #{designInfo}, applicable_interface = #{applicableInterface}, notes = #{notes}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, p.material_name AS product_name FROM uv_oil_matte_compatibility c LEFT JOIN uv_oil_matte_product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY c.display_order ASC, c.id ASC
SELECT c.*, p.material_name AS product_name FROM uv_oil_matte_compatibility c LEFT JOIN uv_oil_matte_product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO uv_oil_matte_compatibility (product_id, post_processing_step, compatibility_status, display_order) VALUES (#{productId}, #{postProcessingStep}, #{compatibilityStatus}, #{displayOrder})

INSERT INTO uv_oil_matte_compatibility (product_id, post_processing_step, compatibility_status, display_order) VALUES
(#{item.productId}, #{item.postProcessingStep}, #{item.compatibilityStatus}, #{item.displayOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, p.material_name AS product_name FROM uv_oil_matte_compatibility c LEFT JOIN uv_oil_matte_product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.product_id = #{productId} AND c.post_processing_step = #{postProcessingStep}

SELECT DISTINCT p.*
, c.compatibility_status
FROM uv_oil_matte_product p
INNER JOIN uv_oil_matte_compatibility c ON p.id = c.product_id
AND (p.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.notes LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND c.post_processing_step = #{stepName}
ORDER BY p.material_code ASC, p.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) FROM uv_oil_matte_product p
INNER JOIN uv_oil_matte_compatibility c ON p.id = c.product_id
AND (p.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.notes LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND c.post_processing_step = #{stepName}
SELECT DISTINCT post_processing_step FROM uv_oil_matte_compatibility ORDER BY post_processing_step ASC

SELECT step_category AS "category", post_processing_step AS "step" FROM uv_oil_matte_compatibility WHERE step_category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY step_category, post_processing_step ORDER BY step_category, post_processing_step

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT p.id FROM uv_oil_matte_product p INNER JOIN uv_oil_matte_compatibility c ON p.id = c.product_id
AND (p.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.notes LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND c.post_processing_step IN
#{step}
GROUP BY p.id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.post_processing_step) = #{stepCount} ) tmp
